text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon comes up to me<n>while I'm
walking down the hallway.<n>It seems she's still
fretting over the<n>upcoming party...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to make a cyborg<n>costume, but
there is insufficient time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I worry it won't be ready for the party<n>at my
current pace.
choice_data_list: Why don't you think of a different costume?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something different? ...Indeed, that<n>would be a
wise course of action,<n>given the time remaining.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A costume that can be made quickly,<n>doesn't
require changing one's<n>expression, and is within
my<n>performance capabilities...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will search using these criteria.<n>Commencing
mission.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
An animal that has the same<n>expression at all
times? Hm... How<n>about a shoebill?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I read in an encyclopedia that, while<n>shoebills do
have different<n>expressions, they don't move
very<n>much, so it's hard to make them out.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! There's a fantasy<n>novel that has
a talking shoebill in it,<n>and—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. I almost started<n>rambling there...
It's a bad habit of<n>mine.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I appreciate your help.<n>Preparing to
input data on shoebills.<n>Could you tell me where
this<n>encyclopedia is located?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Retrieving information on shoebillsfrom memory. The World's MostPeculiar Animals, page 36, figure 1.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Reproduction complete. What do you<n>think? I
would like your honest<n>opinion.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I point out that even if Mihono<n>Bourbon's
expression doesn't<n>change, it doesn't mean she
has to<n>keep her entire body still.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your response is logical. I predict that<n>remaining
perfectly still at the party<n>will dampen the mood
even more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Removing shoebill costume from<n>potential
candidates. Resuming<n>search for an appropriate
costume.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya talkin' about? This isn't<n>some kinda
puzzle ya gotta solve.<n>You just gotta enjoy
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not like you're gonna<n>find anything
lookin' round here.<n>Actually... what about that
over there?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But a carrot is very similar to a<n>shoebill... Strictly
speaking, a carrot<n>moves even less than a
shoebill.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then why don't ya go as a leaf or<n>somethin'?
Y'know, just sway in the<n>breeze.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Uhhh, you waitin' for me to say<n>somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon continues her<n>search for
costume inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Costume candidates in school have<n>been
exhausted. Locating potential<n>costumes is
proving difficult.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, Creek said I would be<n>perfectly fine as I
am. That even if I<n>wore a costume, I should be
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But any attempt to imitate something<n>will mean I
am not being "as I am."
choice_data_list:
Isn't there anything you'd like to be? You don't
have to overthink it.

Isn't there anything you'd like to be? You don't
have to overthink it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something I'd like to be... A star<n>fighter zooming
through the cosmos,<n>perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, that would be more difficult to<n>implement than
a cyborg. As far as<n>alternatives...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A fast and strong Umamusume. That<n>is all that
comes to mind at present.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I really am a boring person.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'll think it over a little more... I must<n>complete the
mission I have been<n>assigned.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon sets off walking<n>with her head
held high as if to psych<n>herself up. It looks like
she's not<n>ready to give up yet.
